title: Middle Eastern Clay Pot Roast
description: A deliciously rich and flavorful Middle Eastern-style clay pot roast, perfect for a special occasion. The intense flavors of the spices and aromatics will make your taste buds dance.

ingredients.name: intensely peppery middle eastern spice blend

instructions: Season the pork shoulder with the Middle Eastern spice blend, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in the clay pot over medium-high heat. Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the pork shoulder from the pot and set it aside. Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it's softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic.
Add the chicken broth, lemon juice, and browned pork shoulder to the pot. Cover the pot with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the pork is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving. Garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve the pork shoulder with the vegetables and juices from the pot.
